info.name: HealthSphere API
info.description: Complete API collection for HealthSphere Backend with Authentication, User, Notifications, Schedules, Food, Steps, Exercises, Admin, and Super Admin endpoints. Updated Apr 2026.

body.raw:
{
  "schedule_type": "medicine",
  "title": "Morning Medication",
  "description": "Blood pressure medication",
  "start_date": "2026-01-20",
  "start_time": "08:00",
  "repeat_type": "daily",
  "end_condition": "never",
  "reminder_enabled": true,
  "reminder_mode": "notification",
  "medicine_details": {
    "medicine_name": "Lisinopril",
    "dosage_text": "10mg tablet",
    "instructions": "Take with water"
  }
}
